title: AI Presales Engineer
description:
• High‑impact work shaping real AI solutions , not just concepts.
  • Access to cutting‑edge tech and rapid growth with top industry partners.

About Our Client

The company operates within the Technology sector and is recognised for its contributions to innovative technological solutions. It has a robust presence and offers an engaging environment for professionals to excel.

Job Description

Design AI That Makes a Real Impact

Collaborate with clients to co‑create cutting‑edge AI solutions that deliver tangible business value, not just theoretical concepts. Transform ideas into functional prototypes and lead engineering teams to scale them into robust, production-ready solutions.

Solve Complex Delivery Challenges

Break down delivery barriers, troubleshoot technical roadblocks, and ensure seamless collaboration between engineers and customer teams.

Stay Ahead of the Innovation Curve

Work closely with our industry‑leading partners to stay plugged into the latest AI advancements, continuously enhancing how we deliver solutions.

Champion Responsible AI

Promote ethical AI practices including fairness, privacy, compliance, and bias reduction to ensure our solutions are both impactful and responsible.

Become a Trusted Advisor to Senior Leaders

Build strong relationships with senior stakeholders, offering strategic, constructive guidance to help them lead confidently in the AI space.

Drive Success Across Multiple Projects

Oversee delivery across numerous accounts and initiatives, raising the bar through strong leadership, clarity, and accountability.

What You Bring

  • Deep experience in AI, machine learning, and data‑driven solutions, including Generative AI.
  • Strong presales and customer‑facing delivery background.
  • Ability to turn complex technology into clear business value.
  • Technical depth across modern AI tools and frameworks.
  • Early‑engagement strategy skills and a solid consultancy foundation.
  • End‑to‑end implementation experience from strategy through deployment.
  • Strategic thinker with strong hands‑on execution.
  • Highly personable, charismatic communicator with strong consultancy presence.

The Successful Applicant

A successful AI Presales Engineer should have:

  • A strong background in technology solutions, preferably in consultancy, fintech, technology companies.
  • Proven experience in solution design and technical architecture.
  • Excellent communication and presentation skills.
  • The ability to work collaboratively with cross-functional teams.
  • Proficiency in understanding client requirements and translating them into technical solutions.
  • A commitment to delivering high-quality results within deadlines.

What's on Offer

  • High-impact work where your ideas directly shape real AI solutions used by leading organisations.
  • Ownership and autonomy to drive solutions end-to-end, influence strategy, and shape how AI is delivered.
  • A supportive, high-performing team of smart, curious people who love solving meaningful problems together.
  • Fast career growth, visibility with senior leaders, and opportunities to step into strategy, delivery, or technical leadership.
  • A culture that values ethics and responsible AI, ensuring the solutions you build genuinely make a positive impact.

Contact
